body_full:
4. Preventing unintentional deprovisioning
a. This request stems from when a member of the CIAM team uploaded the wrong file and started removing hundreds of users from our Tableau site (which we then had to reprovision)
b. We set up a Tableau workbook to track user counts to look for sudden drops, but this is not a long term solution (and, this is just for Tableau, but it could happen to our other apps)
c. Just a few weeks ago, 300+ users were dropped suddenly from our site and we had to track down who kicked it off and why

5. Automatic Google Cloud ID updates
a. When a user's email address changes, their Cloud ID must also change to avoid a disruption in access & provisioning (it is an equal pain point between ABI & CIAM)
b. We request CIAM put a process in place to do this automatically (instead of ABI needing to email them) and Manish said it was possible, but still has not been done
c. There is no workaround... when a Cloud ID needs updating, we are still emailing CIAM
